channel.title: birthday on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in birthday on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: The Three Birthday Problem
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: A while ago one of my aunts posted that 3 of her Facebook friends were having a birthday that day. It seems like a remarkable coincidence, but is it? This observation is reminiscent of a well known problem in probability that yields a surprising result. The Conventional 2 Birthday Problem The conventional probability theory known as the birthday problem or birthday paradox concerns the probability that, given a group of N people, at least two such people in the group have the same birthday.
